granola.comment: SENTINEL — Meeting transcripts, action items, summaries. Auto-pulled after every call.

google-calendar.comment: SENTINEL — Read upcoming meetings, trigger pre-meeting briefs 1hr before each call.

gmail.comment: QUILL — Read inbox, search threads, inform draft replies. Read-only, no send.

gws.comment: QUILL / NEXUS — Official Google Workspace CLI with built-in MCP. Full Drive, Sheets, Docs access.

notion.comment: NEXUS — Read/write pages and databases. Client notes, project docs, internal content.

github.comment: NEXUS — Manage this repo, track client project files, create issues for blocked tasks.

firecrawl.comment: INTEL / SCOUT — Convert any URL to clean markdown. Scrapes company sites, press pages, pricing. $16/mo.

apify.comment: INTEL / SCOUT — 6,000+ scrapers: LinkedIn profiles, Google Search, news sites, job boards, Google Maps.

syncgtm.comment: SCOUT — Waterfall enrichment across 50+ data providers. 87% email match rate. Replaces Apollo.
